title: TryFrom/TryInto
description: TryFrom/TryInto are like From/Into but for conversions that can fail, returning a Result.
instructions: Implement TryFrom to convert with validation.
hints: Check that each component is in the range 0..=255.
Use `u8::try_from(value)` or check manually and cast.
Return a descriptive error message for out-of-range values.
explanation: TryFrom is the fallible version of From. Use it when a conversion might fail (e.g., value out of range). It returns `Result<T, E>`. Implementing TryFrom automatically gives you TryInto. The `?` operator works seamlessly with TryFrom errors. This pattern is preferred over panicking on invalid conversions.
